name: macclippy
description: A nostalgic desktop paperclip for macOS that watches your screen with a local Gemma model (via Ollama), pops helpful tips, runs reminders, answers questions, optionally reacts to your webcam, and scoots away from your cursor.
author: MacClippy contributors

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: MacClippy uses your camera only when you turn on webcam glances, to react with a friendly comment. Frames are processed locally and never leave your Mac.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: MacClippy looks at your screen to offer helpful tips using a local AI model. Screenshots are processed locally and never leave your Mac.
